visual_description: Two men in light-colored shirts sit at a desk; one adjusts his glasses while the other looks forward with a focused expression. The camera then shifts to a man leaning on a laptop, appearing tired, before cutting to a wider view of a dimly lit office where a man in a white shirt stands behind a seated colleague working on a laptop. A man in a dark suit and tie, wearing a headset, stands looking ahead while other staff move in the background.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
